    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

    R

    reflectionMethod(Method) - Method in class com.habbashx.proxy.MethodContext.MethodContextBuilder
     
    Request - Annotation Interface in com.habbashx.annotation
    Marks a method as an HTTP endpoint declaration.
    RequestFactory - Class in com.habbashx.proxy.factory
    Public entry point of the framework — assembles all components and produces a live proxy for a given API class.
    RequestMethod - Class in com.habbashx.request
    Encapsulates a single HTTP request — its target URI, body, headers, and the BuildStrategy that determines the HTTP verb — and provides both synchronous and asynchronous dispatch via Java's HttpClient.
    RequestMethod(HttpClient, String, String, String[], BuildStrategy) - Constructor for class com.habbashx.request.RequestMethod
     
    RequestProxyEngine - Class in com.habbashx.proxy.engine
    Byte Buddy interception target that drives the entire request pipeline for every proxy method call.
    RequestProxyEngine(InterceptorHierarchy, Executor, MethodCache) - Constructor for class com.habbashx.proxy.engine.RequestProxyEngine
     
    RequestRegistry - Class in com.habbashx.request.registry
    Registry that maps each HttpMethod to its BuildStrategy and dispatches HTTP requests both synchronously and asynchronously.
    RequestRegistry(HttpClient) - Constructor for class com.habbashx.request.registry.RequestRegistry
    Creates a registry and registers the four default HTTP method strategies.
